prompt: Keep the woman's face, hair, skin tone, body, and her fine NAVY-AND-WHITE PINSTRIPE cotton midi dress unchanged and photoreal — do not alter her identity. You MAY redraw her lower legs and feet ONLY as needed to plant them naturally on the ground. CRITICAL: she stands on LEVEL pale stone paving — a single flat continuous ground plane. BOTH feet and BOTH black flat shoes are fully visible and planted firmly FLAT on the paving. NO steps, NO raised blocks, NO ledges, NO edges, NO gap or void beneath her feet. She is firmly grounded and balanced, NOT floating, NOT perched on an edge, NOT mid-fall. A soft realistic contact shadow sits directly beneath each foot. Background: a bright white Cycladic plaster wall with a weathered pale-blue wooden shutter set HIGH in the upper-right, clearly above and well clear of her head. A small sprig of lavender low at the base of the wall. Soft warm Mediterranean daylight. Photographic, editorial, medium-format film look, fine grain, muted natural color, a real photograph never illustration or CGI. Vertical 2:3.
